results.name: the share link OPENS and RENDERS the app fullscreen in a COLD browser (the Telegram tap)
a delivery Service Worker is live (the app runs on a content worker, not bare HTTP)
the app runs on the ONE Holo Runtime delivery worker (holo-fhs-sw.js — the κ-cache), not the older per-app worker
the app SELF-RESOLVES by its content address (κ-route returns its bytes)
the 2nd open is served network-free from the κ-cache (x-holo-cache: hit) — the runtime advantage

spec: A holo app is shareable by one content link (holospace.html?app=<ref>#k=<κ>). Tapped in a cold, fresh browser (the Telegram path), it opens and renders the app fullscreen with the Share-to-Run chrome, self-resolves the app by its content address, runs on the ONE Holo Runtime delivery worker (holo-fhs-sw.js, the κ-cache), and the 2nd open is network-free.
